---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the XBPneus system
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see in XBPneus.

## Problem Statement
Explain the problem this feature would solve or why it's needed.

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution or how the feature should work.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered other approaches or workarounds? Describe them here.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or links related to your proposal.
